creator: a.ulasov@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Matthias Andree from comment #19)
I attached output.
All my ports are updated. I've used ports not binary packages.

I was advised to update system to 9.3 or newer. 
The reason is - 
"...The Objective-C runtime libraries changed some time ago, so the old auth-ldap 2.0.3 release no longer works because the new, lighter, run-time library lacks a few methods on the basic objects."
